title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at NABARD

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at NABARD
jsonLd.description:
We at NABARD are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NABARD:
NABARD is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NABARD!
